content_body: The cabin was exceedingly well-appointed. The rustic decor was tasteful and uncluttered. The appliances, bathrooms, and thermostat were current, appearing new. The kitchen had everything we needed and more, from spices to wine glasses with and without stems. The bathrooms were spacious with fluffy towels and a few toiletries. Too many unexpected touches to list. Surpassed expectations. Graceful and cozy. Just perfect.
title: Surpassed Our Expectations!
